title: com.para.post
summary: Record containing a Para post with rich text, embeds, replies, language hints, labels, tags, flairs, and optional post type metadata.
relationships: Reuses app.bsky richtext facets and embed unions.
Reply references point to com.atproto.repo.strongRef for thread structure.
constraints: `tags` allow up to 8 values and `flairs` allow up to 10 values.

fields.name: text
fields.description: Primary post content. May be empty when embeds carry the main payload.

fields.name: facets
fields.description: Rich-text annotations for mentions, links, hashtags, and related text metadata.

fields.name: reply
fields.description: Thread linkage for reply chains using atproto strong references.

fields.name: embed
fields.description: Optional media or record embed carried through the standard app.bsky unions.

fields.name: flairs
fields.description: Para-specific flairs that categorize the post inside community and civic flows.

fields.name: postType
fields.description: Optional Para post type such as policy, matter, or meme.
